title: Indian government medical college — GeM tender, pooled staffing
description: Indian tertiary government teaching hospital (180k slides/yr, 12 pathologist FTE, GeM-portal tender procurement, ₹18L pathologist salary 7th CPC, ₹180/min OR cost, ₹6500/bed-day). Public hospital — LOS savings attribution is ambiguous.

comparative.dpa_coverage: wrong-by-default — DPA US salary defaults are 15–20× off; GeM procurement not modeled
comparative.sectra_coverage: wrong-by-default — Sectra EU/Nordic procurement assumptions; no Indian-tender pricing
